assertions.description: Both I2C bus entries correctly list all sensor ICs and correctly identify pull-up resistors tied to VCC. Voltage divider for VBUS sensing (R10/R11→U2 VBUS pin) and battery voltage divider (R4/R21→U1 IO35) are also correctly identified.

Q1 is a standard CP2102→ESP32 auto-reset circuit (dual NPN in SOT-363). Q2/Q3/Q4 (all MOSFETs) appear in transistor_circuits but Q1 does not, suggesting BJT detection in transistor_circuits is incomplete or the dual-unit symbol (units 1 & 2 both reference Q1) causes the BJT to be skipped by the circuit detector.
